name: Xepa Soul
message: Xepa-Soul Pattinson (M) Sdn Bhd: A leading pharmaceutical manufacturing enterprise in Malaysia. Founded in 1967 in Singapore, Xepa has grown and evolved at the cutting edge of the pharmaceutical industry. From our modest early years when Xepa Laboratories Pte. Ltd. produced a limited range of pharmaceutical products in a small flatted factory, we have relocated twice, to larger manufacturing plants in Malacca, Malaysia. Today, Xepa is the leading manufacturer of off-patent pharmaceuticals in Malaysia. What we do Xepa aims to be the first to introduce off-patent pharmaceuticals to Malaysia and our regional markets. To this end, our laboratories develop products – formulating, designing and validating – that are then manufactured to exacting standards. From there, our marketing team researches, brands, positions, promotes and handles sales of our products to private and government-run pharmacies, clinics and hospitals, within Malaysia and across regional markets.
